sentences.arabic: نَسِيَ أَيْمَنُ كِتَابَ الرِّيَاضِيَّاتِ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Ejmen je zaboravio knjigu matematike kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Ayman forgot his math book at home.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنْ زَمِيلِهِ فِي الصَّفِّ أَنْ يُشَارِكَهُ الْكِتَابَ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio je drugaricu iz razreda da podijeli s njim knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his classmate to share the book with him.

sentences.arabic: وَافَقَ الزَّمِيلُ بِكُلِّ سُرُورٍ وَجَلَسَا مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Drugić se rado složio i sjeli su zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: The classmate agreed with pleasure and they sat together.

sentences.translation: Nakon toga postali su bliski prijatelji.
sentences.translationEn: After that they became close friends.
